title: Connected Column with one way link

posts.author: Julie2 (Julie2)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Does anyone know if there is a way to have a one-way connected column? Just to stop people changing it in the linked board my mistake. I know you can lock the column down, but owners may still change the column by mistake.
